value.found_quote: At Google Cloud Next ‘26, we announced that more than 50 Google-managed Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers are generally available or in preview, with more on the way.
value.rationale: The page directly describes Google-managed MCP servers, stating that more than 50 are generally available or in preview, matching the claim. Title also reads "50+ fully managed MCP servers now available for Google Cloud services," indicating active/GA availability (with some in preview).
